---

## Line Items

## Notes

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by OCR-processing all Juniper-related bills in purchases. Added YAML frontmatter (bill schema) to three matching records while preserving original note bodies, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read system workflows and schema before task work, treated inbox as request not canonical truth, performed focused structured-record maintenance, and deleted inbox item after successful completion per inbox rules.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox file requested: 'OCR all bills related to Juniper' (00_inbox/000_next-task.md). Search and reads identified three Juniper-related bill records in 50_finance/purchases. Each contained visible bill fields and line items in body tables, sufficient to populate required bill frontmatter fields defined by finance-record-frontmatter schema. Applied frontmatter without altering body content beyond adding metadata block, then deleted processed inbox item per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
